originalTitle: God of War Laufey is coming to the PS5
summary: Sony ended its big State of Play showcase with a major reveal: the next God of War. The new title is called God of War Laufey, and is once again developed by Sony's Santa Monica Studio. Currently, the game doesn't have a date, but it's coming to the PS5 whenever it does launch. This time, […]
content: Sony ended its big State of Play showcase with a major reveal: the next God of War. The new title is called God of War Laufey, and is once again developed by Sony’s Santa Monica Studio. Currently, the game doesn’t have a date, but it’s coming to the PS5 whenever it does launch. This time, instead of perpetually furious dad Kratos, players will take control of Faye / Laufey, as the title implies. That means that while the tone of the game seems somewhat similar to past God of War titles, the gameplay looks quite different, with much more aerobatic action punctuated by magic instead of Kratos’ heavy violence. Also, there’s a giant, six-legged cat that can fly. And a talking gelatinous cube named Phranque that fights alongside you. You can get a good look at the game in action with this lengthy 20-minute reveal video: [Media: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HLMX2w3cwuE] Deborah Ann Woll, who played Faye in God of War Ragnarök, is reprising the role for Laufey. The game’s cast also includes Jack Quaid as Phranque and Perlina Lau as Rue, the talking ribbons attached Faye’s sword. [Media: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uKMCqyeBWmU&rco=1] Ever since a soft reboot in 2018, God of War has become one of Sony’s tentpole series, on par with the likes of The Last of Us and the Horizon games. A sequel, Ragnarök, launched on the PS5 in 2022, and the series is also being turned into a live-action streaming show on Prime Video. Earlier this year Sony surprise-launched a 2D prequel called Sons of Sparta. The new game is a shift for blockbuster video games, which for years have focused on stories about dads. With Faye’s starring role, it seems like moms are finally getting their due.
chineseSummary: 索尼结束了盛大的《State of Play》展示，并公布了一个重大消息：下一个《战神》。新游戏名为《战神Laufey》，再次由索尼圣莫尼卡工作室开发。目前，该游戏尚无具体日期，但只要它推出，它就会登陆 PS5。这次， […]
chineseContent: 索尼结束了盛大的《State of Play》展示，并公布了一个重大消息：下一个《战神》。新游戏名为《战神Laufey》，再次由索尼圣莫尼卡工作室开发。目前，该游戏尚未确定具体日期，但只要它发布，它就会登陆 PS5。这一次，玩家将控制费耶/劳菲，而不是永远愤怒的父亲奎托斯，正如标题所暗示的那样。这意味着，虽然游戏的基调似乎与过去的《战神》游戏有些相似，但游戏玩法看起来却截然不同，更多的是由魔法打断的特技动作，而不是奎托斯的重型暴力。此外，还有一只巨大的、能飞的六足猫。还有一个名为 Phranque 的会说话的凝胶状立方体，它会与你并肩作战。您可以通过这个长达 20 分钟的冗长揭晓视频来详细了解游戏的实际情况：[媒体：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HLMX2w3cwuE] 在《战神诸神黄昏》中扮演 Faye 的黛博拉·安沃尔 (Deborah Ann Woll) 将重新扮演 Laufey 的角色。游戏的演员阵容还包括饰演 Phranque 的 Jack Quid 和饰演 Rue 的 Perlina Lau，会说话的丝带系在 Faye 的剑上。 [媒体：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uKMCqyeBWmU&rco=1] 自 2018 年软重启以来，《战神》已成为索尼的主打系列游戏之一，与《最后生还者》和《地平线》等游戏齐名。续集《诸神黄昏》于 2022 年在 PS5 上推出，该系列也将在 Prime Video 上制作成真人流媒体节目。今年早些时候，索尼出人意料地推​​出了 2D 前传《斯巴达之子》。这款新游戏是重磅视频游戏的一次转变，多年来这些游戏一直专注于有关父亲的故事。随着费耶的主演，妈妈们似乎终于得到了应有的回报。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
